_comment: Single source of truth for testimonials so attribution can never diverge again. TODO(client) #2: the 'jones' quote was credited to Mr B Jones on 4 pages but to AURA Leisure and Libraries on Glass Partitions — Mr B Jones (majority usage) kept pending confirmation.

jones.quote: Dividing offices up can be tough with less natural light, your installation of glass partitions made such a difference to the office space. I can’t fault them! So modernised and stylish.
jones.cite: Mr B Jones, Chester Business Park

kinnerton-short.quote: Direct Interiors delivered on every aspect throughout the build, on time and within budget. My new offices are fit for purpose and look fantastic!
kinnerton-short.cite: Kinnerton House, Bell Meadow Business Park

kinnerton-long.quote: Direct Interiors have been a regular contractor at Bell Meadow Business Park, working on the initial build of the site and on subsequent office fit outs and refurbishments over the last 20 years. We have always found their work to be of a high standard and no job is too small or too large. They deliver completed works on time, communication is excellent, rates are competitive, and I would not hesitate to recommend the company for any fit out or refurbishment works.
kinnerton-long.cite: Kinnerton House, Bell Meadow Business Park

karai.quote: What a great set of lads you have. Polite, considerate and very hard working. They’re a pleasure to work with and represent your company. Took out the old suspended ceiling & lighting without fuss. Installed the new ceiling & LED panels all within 1 day!! Left the place spotless when they left. Would definitely recommend.

golden-fish.quote: I contacted Direct Interiors from a recommendation of a friend who had some similar works completed. I was introduced to Danny & Richie – we met on site the next day to go through all my requirements. They gave me a really competitive price and the works were completed the following week. As a result of the PVC cladding works, I have now achieved my 5-star hygienic food rating. Thanks to Danny, Richie and the team for the swift turnaround.
golden-fish.cite: Mr P Williams, Golden Fish & Chips

aura-washrooms.quote: Direct Interiors completely refurbished each WC on our building without any inconvenience to the public or staff. We created a plan which offered great alternative arrangements whilst they were working in each area. The end result looks great!

matthew-arnold.quote: It’s trendy, modern and looks fantastic. It’s done exactly what we wanted it to do. It lets so much natural light in whilst still providing that barrier of separation. Faultless job, thanks guys!
matthew-arnold.cite: Receptionist, Matthew Arnold Primary School, Liverpool

padeswood-member.quote: Wow, I can’t believe this is our wash room. It feels so much bigger! The clinical finish on the cladding is fantastic, it looks so clean. You have done a phenomenal job and the finish is of the highest quality. I can’t wait to get in them showers! Now we just need the rest of the building doing!
padeswood-member.cite: Mr R Williams, Padeswood & Buckley Golf Club member
